hero.sub: A studio in Midland, Texas where dancers ages two and up build skill, character, and confidence on the floor and beyond it.
hero.imageAlt: Young dancers performing on stage under warm spotlight

mission.body: For seventeen years, families across the Permian Basin have trusted Absolute Dance to shape young performers into kind, disciplined, confident people. Our floors are safe. Our standards are high. Our doors are open to every dancer ready to grow.
mission.imageAlt: Two young dancers laughing together in the studio
mission.pullQuote: She walks in nervous and walks out beaming. Every single week.

classesSection.eyebrow: From first plié to center stage
classesSection.body: Classes are levelled by age and ability so every dancer is challenged, supported, and seen. Schedules run August through May with summer intensives.

classes.title: Ballet
classes.body: Classical technique built on Vaganova foundations. Pre-ballet, graded levels, and pointe.

whyUs.headlineLead: The reason a dancer comes back

pillars.title: A safe, positive floor
pillars.body: Encouragement before correction. Boundaries before pressure. Every dancer, every level.

pillars.title: Discipline that travels
pillars.body: The focus we build in class shows up at school, on the team, and at the dinner table.

pillars.title: Real stage time
pillars.body: Recitals, competitions, and community performances throughout the year.

facultySection.eyebrow: The people on the floor with your dancer

faculty.name: Kristen Hollimon
faculty.bio: Owner since 2014. A University of Tennessee Dance Team alum who turned a lifelong love of dance into Midland's most welcoming studio.

faculty.name: Chelsey Epperson
faculty.bio: Shapes the artistry on our stage, from first plié to senior solo, with the eye of a seasoned director.

faculty.name: Bonnie Baeza
faculty.bio: Keeps every classroom safe, structured, and joyful. The reason small dancers settle in fast.

events.body: From holiday showcases to the spring recital, our dancers spend the year working toward real moments on a real stage. Family-first, audience-warm, professionally produced.
events.imageAlt: Packed theatre watching an Absolute Dance recital

testimonials.name: Lauren M.
testimonials.quote: My girls have grown up on this floor. The teachers know them, push them, and love them. We will never go anywhere else.

testimonials.name: Marco G.
testimonials.quote: I expected a dance class. We got a community. The discipline she learned here shows up in everything she does.

testimonials.name: Ava R.
testimonials.quote: I started at four and I am still here. Absolute is the reason I want to dance in college.

faqSection.intro: Still wondering? Call the studio. A real person answers, every weekday.

faq.a: We welcome dancers ages two and up. Pre-Dance is built for our smallest students, with age-levelled classes all the way through high school.

faq.q: Can my dancer try a class first?
faq.a: Yes. We offer a no-pressure trial visit so your dancer can meet the teacher and the room before you commit.

faq.q: What does my dancer need to wear?
faq.a: Each class has a simple dress code so dancers can move safely. We send the full list the moment you register.
Monthly tuition is based on hours per week. Multi-class and family discounts apply automatically. Full pricing lives in the parent portal.
Yes. Costume fees are billed in the fall so families have time to plan. We keep choices age-appropriate and reusable when possible.

faq.q: What happens if we miss a class?
faq.a: Life happens. Missed classes can be made up in any equivalent class within thirty days.

finalCta.body: Spots fill fast each season. Register today and reserve your dancer's place for the 2025 – 2026 year.

footer.blurb: A Midland, Texas dance studio where dancers ages two and up grow into kind, confident performers and people.

meta.title: Absolute Dance — Dance Lessons in Midland, TX
meta.description: Inspiring the dancer's heart in Midland, Texas since 2008. Ballet, jazz, hip hop, tap, contemporary and pre-dance for ages two and up.
meta.ogDescription: Where dancers ages two and up build skill, character and confidence.
